Title: phpMyFAQ's Missing CONFIGURATION_EDIT Permission Check on 12 Admin API Configuration Tab Endpoints Allows Information Disclosure by Any Authenticated User
Description: 12 endpoints in `ConfigurationTabController.php` use `userIsAuthenticated()` (login-only check) instead of `userHasPermission(PermissionType::CONFIGURATION_EDIT)`. This allows any authenticated user — including ones with zero admin permissions — to enumerate system configuration metadata including the permission model, active template, cache backend, mail provider, and translation provider.
